title: Transgenerational epigenetic inheritance: from phenomena to molecular mechanisms.
author_string: Liberman, Noa, Wang, Simon Yuan, Greer, Eric Lieberman
abstract: Inherited information not encoded in the DNA sequence can regulate a variety of complex phenotypes. However, how this epigenetic information escapes the typical epigenetic erasure that occurs upon fertilization and how it regulates behavior is still unclear. Here we review recent examples of brain related transgenerational epigenetic inheritance and delineate potential molecular mechanisms that could regulate how non-genetic information could be transmitted.
